scores.notes: Key issues include missing words ('pursuant to this' -> 'pursuant tothis'), incorrect spacing ('Limited Power of Attorney shallbe'), missing clauses ('(iii) any obligation or liability of the undersigned for profit disgorgement under Section 16(b) of the Exchange Act; and (e)'), and formatting/spacing errors ('underSection16of theExchangeAct'). Numeric precision and table structure are perfect, but layout and text accuracy suffer from minor errors.
